title: Doff Liquid Seaweed Plant Feed Concentrate - All Purpose Plant Food Fertiliser 1.2L Makes 360L - Natural Plant Growth Stimulant - Organic Plant Food.
features: ORGANIC BASED FEED - Give your plants a natural boost with Doff Concentrated Liquid Seaweed, a powerful and organic-based plant feed derived from sustainable seaweed sources. Made from sustainably sourced seaweed, this concentrate is environmentally safe, biodegradable, and suitable for organic gardening practices.

NATURAL GROWTH BOOSTER - Packed with organic nutrients, trace elements, and naturally occurring growth hormones, seaweed stimulates robust root development, boosts flowering and fruiting, and enhances overall plant vitality. It is a safe, gentle way to give your plants the nutritional edge they need.

CONCENTRATED FORMULA - Just a small amount goes a long way. This 1.2L bottle dilutes to make up to 360 litres of ready-to-use plant feed, making it ideal for regular feeding throughout the growing season, offering outstanding value and performance for gardeners of all levels.

VERSATILE FEED - Regular use of seaweed feed helps plants better withstand environmental stressors such as drought, transplant shock, frost, and pest attacks, leading to more resilient growth and improved yields. Suitable for a wide range of garden and household plants, including flowers and ornamental plants, Fruit and vegetables, Shrubs and trees, Lawns and turf, Greenhouse crops and indoor plants.
